location.heading: AI Ethics: How to Innovate the Safe and Responsible Way

findings.sentence: Meanwhile, [35%](https://www.accenture.com/us-en/services/applied-intelligence/ai-ethics-governance#:~:text=Responsible%20AI%3A%20Scale%20AI%20with%20confidence,-AI%20brings%20unprecedented&text=In%20fact%2C%20Accenture's%202022%20Tech,for%20their%20misuse%20of%20AI.) of global consumers trust how organizations are implementing AI.
A notorious example of biased AI came from [Amazon's hiring algorithms](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2018/oct/10/amazon-hiring-ai-gender-bias-recruiting-engine).

For example, in 2023, [Samsung](https://mashable.com/article/samsung-chatgpt-leak-details#:~:text=Samsung%20employees%20have%20learned%20this,ChatGPT%20to%20check%20source%20code.) suffered when developers unintentionally exposed sensitive data while integrating their code into ChatGPT.

In response, James Cleverly, the Foreign Secretary of the United Kingdom, recently embarked on a unique [collaboration](https://twitter.com/JamesCleverly/status/1720335352940949970?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1720335352940949970%7Ctwgr%5E4e8495cb01ed5462cda6cddb9fb1436354165109%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.synthesia.io%2Fpost%2Fresponsible-ai) with the [AI video generator](https://www.synthesia.io/features/ai-video-generator) Synthesia to advocate for the safe and responsible use of AI technologies.
[AlgorithmWatch](https://algorithmwatch.org/en/) is a non-profit human rights organization.
[AI Now Institute](https://ainowinstitute.org/) is an AI research center dedicated to understanding the social implications of artificial intelligence.
[DARPA](https://www.darpa.mil/) is primarily known for its role in developing emerging technologies for the U.S.
[CHAI](https://humancompatible.ai/), the Center for Human-Compatible Artificial Intelligence, focuses on designing AI systems that operate according to human principles and values.
[NASCAI](https://cybercemetery.unt.edu/nscai/20211005220330/https://www.nscai.gov/) is a collaborative effort that brings experts from various sectors together to promote AI safety and ethics.

meta.anchor: Partnership on AI (PAI) on Responsible Practices for Synthetic Media

findings.sentence: We are a launch partner to the [Partnership on AI (PAI) on Responsible Practices for Synthetic Media](https://syntheticmedia.partnershiponai.org/) and an active member of the [Content Authenticity Initiative](https://contentauthenticity.org/), reflecting our commitment to shaping a responsible AI future.

We are a launch partner to the [Partnership on AI (PAI) on Responsible Practices for Synthetic Media](https://syntheticmedia.partnershiponai.org/) and an active member of the [Content Authenticity Initiative](https://contentauthenticity.org/), reflecting our commitment to shaping a responsible AI future.

After all, our users generate videos from plain text, using lifelike [AI avatars](https://www.synthesia.io/features/avatars) that can narrate almost anything in [130+ languages](https://www.synthesia.io/features/languages). The potential for misuse cannot be ignored, and reinforcing ethical standards and responsible moderation is critical. Our CEO, Victor Riparbelli, has been vocal about these challenges, emphasizing the need for ethical AI in various keynotes and TV appearances, including his 2023 SaaStock keynote. Play Our approach to AI ethics is comprehensive and forward-thinking. As the world of artificial intelligence media advances, we lead by example, relying on the following pillars of ethical AI:
